curation_notes: Primary locations derived from patch diff. The core fix is in iterator.rs (introducing a LendingIterator trait to replace std::iter::Iterator) and result.rs (converting ResultIterator). The patch is noisy (32 non-test source files changed) because the lifetime parameter changes propagate through many type signatures across the crate. Vulnerability class 'use-after-free' confirmed from advisory description ('This is a use-after-free bug') and CWE-416.
